title: schinus molle var. molle
intro: Schinus molle var. molle, also known as the Peruvian pepper tree or Molle, is a variety of the Schinus molle plant, which is a member of the Anacardiaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schinus molle var. molle include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Schinus molle var. molle include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
